pageContext.name: Sidious & Vader King & Queen Chess Piece Pair
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Royal Selangor are proud to present two of the galaxy's baddest, the Sidious & Vader King & Queen Chess Piece Pair!  Darth Sidious, the master masquerading as Supreme Chancellor, then as Emperor, and Vader, the apprentice lured, as a troubled youth, inexorably to the Dark Side that unites the Sith.  Star Wars fans, and those who love a good game of chess, be sure to add Sidious & Vader to your collection today!
